events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Cyndi Lauper, the iconic American singer known for her vibrant personality and hits like "Girls Just Want to Have Fun," turns 73 today.

angles.name: Cyndi's enduring appeal
angles.copy: Time to celebrate the one and only Cyndi Lauper turning 73! From 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' to 'True Colors', her music is pure joy. What’s your favourite Cyndi track?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary George Michael, who would have been 63 today, a true icon of pop music known for his incredible songwriting and vocal talent.

angles.name: Remembering George Michael
angles.copy: Thinking of the incomparable George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His voice, his songs, his style – forever iconic. What's the George Michael track that always gets you?

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the world lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, whose unparalleled influence on music and culture continues to resonate globally.

angles.name: MJ's Enduring Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost a true legend. Michael Jackson's music and artistry continue to inspire generations. What's your ultimate MJ anthem?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Keep on drumming, Ringo. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on vocals?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist, Brian May, turns 79 today.

angles.name: Brian May's Big Day
angles.copy: Sending a huge 79th birthday shout-out to the legendary Brian May! From stadium-rocking riffs to his work in astrophysics, he truly is a rock star in every sense. What's your go-to Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The inimitable frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Mick Jagger's Milestone
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still got the moves! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track that makes you want to dance?

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star," forever changing the music landscape.

angles.name: MTV's game-changer
angles.copy: Remember when music videos were a brand new thing? 45 years ago today, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star, or just make it better?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis' groundbreaking debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', which catapulted them to stardom, was released 32 years ago today (August 29, 1994).

angles.name: Definitely Maybe anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed everything. What's the track from that album that still gives you chills?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, began 57 years ago today.

angles.name: Woodstock's legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. What's the iconic performance you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away 49 years ago today.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, the world lost Elvis Presley. His legacy as the King of Rock and Roll is truly unmatched. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur was shot
events.blurb: On this day 30 years ago, hip-hop icon Tupac Shakur was fatally shot in Las Vegas, an event that tragically ended his influential career.

angles.name: Tupac's 30-year mark
angles.copy: Thirty years ago today, we lost a voice that defined a generation. Remembering Tupac Shakur's incredible impact on music and culture. What's a Tupac lyric that stays with you?

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of Jimi Hendrix, a guitar virtuoso who redefined rock music.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix's legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago, the world lost a true guitar legend. Jimi Hendrix's influence is still felt in every riff. What's your favourite Jimi Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road', featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover, was released 57 years ago (September 26, 1969).

angles.name: Abbey Road's timeless appeal
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album, that cover... pure genius. What's your top track from their final recorded masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll icon with a voice that still commands attention. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the unmistakable voice of Oasis and a rock icon in his own right, turns 54 today.

angles.name: Liam's big 54
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock and roll swagger. What’s your favourite Liam moment, musical or otherwise?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem "Imagine" was released as a single in the UK 51 years ago (October 24, 1975).

angles.name: Imagine's lasting message
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' became a UK single. A song that still resonates globally. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod
events.blurb: Twenty-five years ago, Apple unveiled the first iPod, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: iPod's quarter-century
angles.copy: Can you believe it's 25 years since the original iPod was revealed? '1,000 songs in your pocket' changed everything. What was your first iPod model?

events.title: James Bond Day: 64 years of 007
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating 64 years since the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Happy 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years of 007 on the big screen. Which Bond actor is your definitive Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're remembering the genius of John Lennon. His music and message live on. What's your favourite John Lennon solo track?
